ns1:revision.ns1:text:
'''Server support for kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.9 (3.10.0-1160.2.1.el7) '''Client support for unpatched kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.9 (3.10.0-1160.2.1.el7) *RHEL 8.3 (4.18.0-240.1.1.el8_3) *SLES12 SP5 (4.12.14-122.20.1) *Ubuntu 18.04 (4.15.0-72) '''Recommended e2fsprogs version: '''
*v1.45.6.wc2 '''Interoperability Support: '''
*Clients & Servers: Latest 2.10.X and Latest 2.11.X == Issues fixed between 2.12.5 and 2.12.6 == ''' Improvement ''' *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11276 LU-11276]: racer: mdc_dev.c:1346:mdc_req_attr_set()) uncovered page *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12222 LU-12222]: LNet should select loopback NI when possible *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12662 LU-12662]: Run pjdfstest POSIX test in review and full testing *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12820 LU-12820] - obd_dirty_transit_pages is always zero and can be removed *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13421 LU-13421] - kernel update [RHEL8.1 4.18.0-147.8.1.el8_1] *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13503 LU-13503] - allow setting larger max_mod_rpcs_in_flight dynamically *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13590 LU-13590] - support for RHEL 7.9 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13600 LU-13600] - limit number of RPCs in flight during recovery *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13657 LU-13657] - kernel update [RHEL8.2 4.18.0-193.6.3.el8_2] *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13761 LU-13761] - MOFED 5.1 support *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13839 LU-13839] - support for RHEL 8.3 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13969 LU-13969] - Updates to lustre-release yaml.sh *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-14140 LU-14140] - osd_idc_find_and_init() should dump details ''' Bug ''' * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9971 LU-9971] - MR: ABA problem in lnet_discover_peer_locked * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10395 LU-10395] - ASSERTION( osd->od_oi_table != NULL && osd->od_oi_count >= 1 ) failed * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10949 LU-10949] - LBUG lu_object.h:688:lu_object_get()) ASSERTION( atomic_read(&o->lo_header->loh_ref) > 0 ) failed * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11269 LU-11269] - ptlrpc_set_add_req()) ASSERTION( req->rq_import->imp_state != LUSTRE_IMP_IDLE ) failed * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11276 LU-11276] - racer: mdc_dev.c:1346:mdc_req_attr_set()) uncovered page * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11669 LU-11669] - add project in yml_test_group() * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11719 LU-11719] - Refactor search_itree * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11782 LU-11782] - interop: conf-sanity test 117 fails with 'get_param should fail' * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12014 LU-12014] - check correct size in ll_dom_finish_open() * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12100 LU-12100] - sanity-quota test_2: user create failure, but expect success * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12233 LU-12233] - Deadlock on LNet shutdown * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12296 LU-12296] - ll_dom_lock_cancel() should zero kms attribute * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12352 LU-12352] - libcfs crashes with certain cpu_npartitions values * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12424 LU-12424] - LNet MR routing: possible loop when discovery is off * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12687 LU-12687] - Fast ENOSPC on direct I/O * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12758 LU-12758] - sanity-quota test 65 fails with 'usr quota not match' * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12761 LU-12761] - sanity test 103a syntax error using version_code * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12865 LU-12865] - sanity test 160f fails with ‘mds1: User cl6 not registered’ * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12870 LU-12870] - sanity-hsm test 9A fails with “uuid Dumping not found in agent list on mds1” * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13088 LU-13088] - sleeping function in target_recovery_overseer * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13149 LU-13149] - Interop: sanityn test 103 fails with 'Lockahead test23 failed, 255' * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13187 LU-13187] - sanity test_129: current dir size 4096, previous limit 20480 * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13225 LU-13225] - add bash completion for lfs * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13278 LU-13278] - Asymmetry in discovery push vs reply handling * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13357 LU-13357] - striped directory doesn't support lookup * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13437 LU-13437] - rename may miss revoking LOOKUP lock to cause stale dentry on client * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13464 LU-13464] - MDT0000 remount in recovery 40 hours * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13471 LU-13471] - LNet: discovery can glitch * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13473 LU-13473] - page discard of non-composite file does not set mirror info * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13477 LU-13477] - LNet: Force full discovery * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13511 LU-13511] - MDS 2.12.4 ASSERTION( top->loh_hash.next == ((void *)0) && top->loh_hash.pprev == ((void *)0) ) failed * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13519 LU-13519] - expand inode if possible for project quota * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13553 LU-13553] - o2iblnd: convert LASSERT (tx->tx_sending > 0); to proper error handling * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13580 LU-13580] - sanity-selinux test_5: sec context seen from 1st mount point is not correct * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13599 LU-13599] - LustreError: 30166:0:(service.c:189:ptlrpc_save_lock()) ASSERTION( rs->rs_nlocks < 8 ) failed * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13608 LU-13608] - MDT stuck in WAITING, abort_recov stuck too * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13609 LU-13609] - lctl --device MGS llog_catlist doesn't list all config files. * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13640 LU-13640] - Interop: conf-sanity test 125 fails with 'test_125 failed with 1' * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13653 LU-13653] - Ignore quota on slave MDTs during creating striped directory * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13667 LU-13667] - ptlrpc_pinger_main is stuck in endless loop * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13687 LU-13687] - interop: "lfs find" prints spurious "No such file or directory" error messages * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13692 LU-13692] - MDS slow/hung threads at mdt_object_local_lock * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13709 LU-13709] - 'lfs mkdir -i -1' may not initialize target MDTs correctly * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13719 LU-13719] - lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1 * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13742 LU-13742] - Provide an selinux_is_enabled for newer kernels * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13763 LU-13763] - ptlrpc_invalidate_import()) lsrza-OST0000_UUID: Unregistering RPCs found (0). Network is sluggish? Waiting them to error out. * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13818 LU-13818] - can not install lustre-client-utils on ubuntu 20.04 * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13892 LU-13892] - LNetError kiblnd_check_conns() Timed out RDMA with 172.19.1.217@o2ib100 (107): c: 8, oc: 0, rc: 8 * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13922 LU-13922] - Client blocked in lstat() * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13907 LU-13907] - /proc/filesystem doesn't list lustre as nodev * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13949 LU-13949] - autogen.sh is missing from the tarball generated by "make dist" * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13960 LU-13960] - conf-sanity test 53a and 53b fail with ‘/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/functions.sh: line 152: var: invalid indirect expansion’ * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-14012 LU-14012] - new layout incompletely initialized in lod_layout_convert() * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-14069 LU-14069] - OBD_FAIL_LDLM_CANCEL_BL_CB_RACE is buggy in ldlm_handle_cp_callback * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-14116 LU-14116] - gss: undefined reference to 'krb5int_enc_des3' * [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-14172 LU-14172] - DIR Stat performance regression in striped dir [[Category:Releases]]
